## Summary

<!-- What changed and why (user-visible or architectural). -->

## Governance

**Full framework:** `site/docs/DESIGN-SYSTEM-GOVERNANCE.md`

### Governance impact

- [ ] SAFE — token-only / localized / no cross-family semantic change
- [ ] REVIEW REQUIRED — shared primitive, breadcrumb, or family-visible UI
- [ ] HIGH RISK — typography, width hierarchy, hero systems, protected surfaces (see governance appendices)
- [ ] CRITICAL / protected system — forms, conversion funnel, JSON-LD shapes, routing, `hreflang`, migration stubs

### Family impact

**Affected families** (check all that apply):

- [ ] Strategic
- [ ] Editorial / Intelligence
- [ ] People / Profile
- [ ] Narrative (e.g. About-style)
- [ ] Conversion (Contact / funnel)

### Intent check

**How does this preserve family intent** (or who approved a deliberate family-level shift)?

<!-- Link RFC / ADR / issue if applicable. -->

### Governance delta (major / architectural PRs)

<!-- Keep short — improves PR archaeology and onboarding. Skip for tiny SAFE fixes. -->

- **Change type:** (e.g. new family primitive / token promotion / layout / copy-only)
- **Protected systems touched?** (yes/no — see governance Appendix A)
- **Families:** (e.g. Editorial only)
- **§11 tier:** SAFE / REVIEW REQUIRED / HIGH RISK / CRITICAL
